analysis.consistency: High. The core attributes (name, type, rarity, attunement) are consistent across the primary JSON structure and the source information.
analysis.quality: High. The description is detailed, providing clear mechanical benefits (+3 bonus, extra radiant damage against fiends/undead, aura effect, paladin scaling). The 'source_type_rarity' field offers contextual metadata.

mechanics_review.core_bonus: +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls (Standard for very rare/legendary weapons).
mechanics_review.damage_rider: 2d10 radiant damage on hit vs. fiend or undead (Appropriate for a holy weapon of this tier).
mechanics_review.special_ability: 10-foot radius aura granting advantage on saves vs. spells/magical effects to self and allies. This is a powerful defensive ability.
mechanics_review.scaling: A specific class feature (Paladin 17+) scaling the aura radius to 30 feet is clearly noted, indicating strong integration with specific class progression.

analysis.suggested_updates: None. The data appears complete and consistent with standard D&D 5e item representation.
